/usr/bin/g++-9 -fPIC -O3 -Wall -Wno-deprecated-declarations -shared -Wl,-soname,liblidar_core.so -o liblidar_core.so CMakeFiles/lidar_core.dir/src/common/tensorrt.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lidar_core.dir/src/core/detector.cpp.o "CMakeFiles/lidar_core.dir/src/core/pointpillar-scatter.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/lidar_core.dir/src/core/lidar_core_generated_lidar-backbone.cu.o" "CMakeFiles/lidar_core.dir/src/core/lidar_core_generated_lidar-postprocess.cu.o" "CMakeFiles/lidar_core.dir/src/core/lidar_core_generated_lidar-voxelization.cu.o" "CMakeFiles/lidar_core.dir/src/core/lidar_core_generated_pillarscatter-kernel.cu.o"  /usr/local/cuda-13.1/lib64/libcudart_static.a -ldl /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librt.a -lnvinfer -lnvinfer_plugin
